* Your courses with the same code are grouped under branches in the LMS system, and when you want to add course material (document, virtual classroom, etc.), you can choose which branch(s) you want to share the relevant document for.

** Our faculty members are required to conduct virtual classroom lessons on the days and times in their weekly schedules.

*** Dear students, please follow the online courses from your fixed computers, you may encounter connection or speed problems on mobile devices.

*** It is highly recommended to use your PCs or laptops for online classes. It is likely to have connection or speed problem on mobile platforms.

We are wherever our students are with our academic staff, all of whom are experts in their fields, who provide

Distance Education

with our strong technological infrastructure.
